name: Summer Relish
recipeIngredient: 1 quart ripe tomatoes, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
2. Cover the mixture and refrigerate.
3. If the relish is too juicy, drain off some liquid.
4. Makes about 1-1/2 quarts.
5. Store in a tightly sealed container in the refrigerator. It will give the fridge a "rich" smell otherwise.
6. This summer relish pairs well with many dishes, including red beans.
